description.from: Deals 243*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 140% of ATK Physical DMG to a random enemy 3times, applies [Grievous Wound] 1 stack, and increases Physical DMG taken by 30% for 4sec.
description.to: Deals 243*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+140% ATK Physical DMG to a random enemy 3 times, applies [Grievous Wound] stacks 1, and increases Physical DMG taken by 30% for 4 sec.

description.from:
For 5sec, increases all allies’ ATK by 300*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) and Physical Evasion by 150, and grants self [Breath of Death] for 7sec.

[Breath of Death]: Evades all Physical Attacks..
description.to:
For 7 sec, increases all allies’ ATK by 393*(1+0.3*Skill Level) and Physical Evasion by 300, and grants self [Breath of Death] for 7 sec.
[Breath of Death] : Attack Speed increases by 30%, damage dealt to enemies increases by 25%, and all Physical Attacks are evaded.

description.from:
Moves behind the enemy and deals 799*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+244.5% ATK Physical DMG, then consumes all [Grievous Wound] stacks on the target to deal additional Physical DMG equal to 180.7% ATK per 1 stacks consumed. On Critical Hit, applies Bleed stacks 1 and resets the cooldown of [Slaughter].

Bleed : Deals 5% ATK Physical Damage over Time every 1sec for 15sec, and stacks up to 20 times..
description.to:
Moves behind the enemy and deals 799*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+459.4% ATK Physical DMG, consuming all [Grievous Wound] stacks on the target and dealing additional Physical DMG equal to 137.8% ATK per 1 stack consumed. On Critical Hit, applies Bleed stacks 1 and resets the cooldown of [Slaughter].
Bleed : Deals 5% ATK Physical DoT every 1 sec for 15 sec, stacking up to 20 times.

description.from:
Every 10sec, when a Normal Attack lands as a Critical Hit, deals 96*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+54.9% ATK Physical DMG 6 times. Each hit has a 65% chance to apply [Grievous Wound] stacks 1.

[Grievous Wound] : Deals 15% ATK Physical Damage over Time every 1sec for 15sec, stacking up to 5 times.
description.to:
Critical Rate increases by 300.
Every 10 sec, when a Normal Attack lands as a Critical Hit, deals 96*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+54.9% ATK Physical DMG 6 times, with a 50% chance per hit to apply [Grievous Wound] stacks 1.
[Grievous Wound] : Deals 15% ATK Physical DoT every 1 sec for 15 sec, stacking up to 5 times.

dark.from: Increases Attack Speed of all allies by 10% for the duration.
dark.to: Normal Attack damage increases by 115% for the duration.

light.from: When there is only 1 enemy, damage increases by 100%.
light.to: Mana cost increases by 1000 and damage increases by 100%.

dark.to: On each hit, reduces the target's Mana by 150.

description.from: [Hack] increases DMG by {0}% and applies 1 Stack of [Bleed] to the target on Crit.
description.to: [Hack] increases DMG by {0}% and applies 1 stack of [Bleed] to the target on Crit.

dark.from: On critical hit, Attack Speed is increased by 24% and Critical Damage by 48% for 5 sec. This effect can only be triggered once every 5 sec.
dark.to: On critical hit, Attack Speed is increased by 300% and Critical Damage by 60% for 5 sec. This effect can only be triggered once every 5 sec.

description.from: When using Normal Attacks or [Rend], has a {0}% chance to apply 1 additional stacks of [Fatal Wound] and deal additional Physical Damage equal to {1}% of Attack Power per [Fatal Wound] Stack.
description.to: When using Normal Attacks or [Rend], has a {0}% chance to apply 1 additional stacks of [Fatal Wound] and deal additional Physical Damage equal to {1}% of Attack Power per [Fatal Wound] stack.
